channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: San Francisco Mayor Proposes Stricter Regulations for Autonomous Vehicles Following Waymo Traffic Incident
item.description: San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie has called for stricter regulations for autonomous vehicles after Waymo's robotaxis caused a massive traffic jam during the July 4 fireworks event. The incident, which...

item.title: Trump Addresses Election Security Concerns in Prime-Time Speech
item.description: President Donald Trump delivered a prime-time address on election security, as reported by The Washington Post. The White House emphasized that the speech would include major revelations about vulnera...

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses Appeal Against Vote Recount in Karnataka Legislative Council Election
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has dismissed an appeal filed by M.K. Pranesh, the Deputy Chairman of the Karnataka Legislative Council, challenging the High Court's order for a recount of votes in the 202...

item.title: KATSEYE Releases Trailer for Their Documentary 'KATSEYE: Wild Hearts'
item.description: KATSEYE, the global girl group formed by the Philippine entertainment company ABS-CBN, has officially released the trailer for their upcoming documentary film titled 'KATSEYE: Wild Hearts'. The docume...

item.title: Globacom's Commitment to Serving All Nigerians
item.description: Globacom's 23-year journey highlights its focus on serving all Nigerians, not just the privileged few. The article explains how Globacom transformed mobile communication by introducing per-second bill...

item.title: Bureaucratic nightmare leaves UK teen stranded in Rome, missing six weeks of school
item.description: A 15-year-old British girl has been stranded in Rome for six weeks after a new passport rule left her unable to return home, missing critical school time. The teenager, who is a dual citizen, faced a ...

item.title: Reimagining Time: Embracing Intuitive Moments Over Chronological Pressures
item.description: The article explores the tension between two concepts of time: chronos, which is linear and measurable, and kairos, which is intuitive and tied to moments of significance. The author argues that moder...

item.title: Vancouver suspect faces multiple assault charges after probation violation
item.description: Dylan Brandon Gaita, 29, remains in custody awaiting the continuation of his bail hearing following allegations of six assaults between January 2025 and June 2026. The accused is charged with two coun...

item.title: Mildura Weather Forecast and Access Issue Notice
item.description: The article provides a weather forecast for Mildura, detailing expected conditions for the day. However, it also includes a technical notice from News Corp Australia regarding access restrictions. The...

item.title: UK Deports Rochdale Gang Leader Despite Pakistan's Involvement
item.description: The UK government has stated that the deportation of Shabir Ahmed, the ringleader of the Rochdale grooming gang, is an internal matter and has no connection with Pakistan. Ahmed, a British-Pakistani c...

item.title: EU Supports ICC Amid US Tensions
item.description: The European Union has strongly condemned recent U.S. efforts to undermine the International Criminal Court (ICC), reaffirming its commitment to international justice. EU spokesperson Anouar El Anouni...

item.title: Rassie Erasmus' Strategy Builds Depth and Versatility in Springboks Squad
item.description: Former Springbok hooker Bismarck du Plessis has praised Rassie Erasmus' ability to cultivate versatile players, enabling the national team to maintain high performance despite frequent squad rotations...

item.title: FIFA assesses Argentina's Falklands banner after World Cup semi-final
item.description: FIFA is reviewing match reports following Argentina players' display of a banner supporting their country's claims to the Falkland Islands during their World Cup semi-final victory against England. Th...

item.title: Trump's Election Speech Lacks Evidence of Foreign Interference Claims
item.description: President Donald Trump's recent primetime speech alleging China's systematic election interference in the 2020 election has drawn criticism for its lack of concrete evidence. Reporter Isaac Saul of Ta...

item.title: Analysis argues White House Smithsonian report echoes historical defenses of the Chinese Exclusion Act
item.description: An analysis by Catherine Rampell, published by The Bulwark and reported on by Raw Story, argues that a recent Trump administration report criticizing the Smithsonian Institution reflects broader theme...

item.title: FRSC Legal Battle Over State Road Authority
item.description: The Federal High Court in Kano has ruled that the Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) cannot enforce traffic checks on state and local government roads. The court declared the FRSC's operations on townsh...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Scrutinizes IDAC Probe into Khumalo and Others Due to Lack of Evidence
item.description: The Madlanga Commission has raised serious concerns about the Investigative Directorate Against Corruption's (IDAC) probe into senior South African Police Service (SAPS) officials, including Crime Int...

item.title: Alberta NDP Leader to Contest Calgary Riding in Upcoming Election
item.description: The article reports that the leader of the Alberta New Democratic Party (NDP) has announced their intention to run in the Calgary riding during the next election. This decision comes amid ongoing poli...

item.title: Pakistan to implement uniform e-SIM transfer policy and expand 5G coverage
item.description: The Senate Standing Committee on Cabinet Secretariat in Pakistan has been informed about a planned uniform policy that will allow consumers to transfer their e-SIM cards up to 10 times without cost. T...

item.title: Campaign Urges Andy Burnham to Oppose Sizewell C Nuclear Project
item.description: The article calls on Andy Burnham, a potential future Prime Minister, to reconsider the Sizewell C nuclear project. It argues that halting the project would free up £14.2bn in taxpayer funds, reduce h...
